title: 3x Box File Clip Board
features: Waterproof, compact and durable the file holds A4 sized documents, photos or work sheets and the clip on the lid will also hold them in place as you take notes.
Powerful clip: holds 100 plain A4 papers, enough storage space for letter-size documents, forms, and notepads.
Wearable, easy cleaning, can be hanging, strong clamping force, no deformation, no rust.
Board: This is a very comfortable writing board. Smooth surface, rounded edges, suitable for any writing or drawing on paper.
description: Ideal for when you're working on the go whether at university, the office or a construction site, this Clipboard Box File offers both a sturdy surface and handy folder. Waterproof, compact and durable the file holds A4 sized documents, photos or work sheets and the clip on the lid will also hold them in place as you take notes. Box File Clipboard Assorted Colours: White/ Blue/ Pink Great for on-the-go Holds: A4 work Measures: 31 x 23.5 x 2cm Powerful clip: holds 100 plain A4 papers, enough storage space for letter-size documents, forms, and notepads. Wearable, easy cleaning, can be hanging, strong clamping force, no deformation, no rust. Board: This is a very comfortable writing board. Smooth surface, rounded edges, suitable for any writing or drawing on paper.
